title: About me
text:
About me

PhD Candidate · Political Science · Aarhus University
Welcome to my website! My name is Mads, and I am a PhD candidate in Political Science at Aarhus University. My research examines how citizens perceive and evaluate their political representatives – with a particular focus on the social and professional backgrounds of politicians and what these mean for political support.
In my PhD dissertation, I use survey experiments and quantitative text analysis to study how perceptions of political elites shape political trust, feelings of representation, and democratic satisfaction among ordinary citizens.
